name: CacheEntry
description: Represents a single value stored in an in-memory or edge cache, identified by a key and governed by a TTL and eviction policy.

key.description: Unique identifier for the cache entry within its namespace or cache instance.

value.description: The cached value, serialized as a string for transport. May represent JSON, binary base64, or a raw scalar.

namespace.description: Logical namespace, database number, or cache instance the entry belongs to.

ttl_seconds.description: Remaining time-to-live in seconds. Zero or omitted indicates the entry does not expire.

expires_at.description: Absolute timestamp at which the entry will expire and become eligible for eviction.

created_at.description: Timestamp the entry was written to the cache.

last_accessed_at.description: Timestamp the entry was most recently read or refreshed, used by LRU/LFU eviction policies.

size_bytes.description: Size of the serialized value in bytes.

tags.description: Surrogate keys or cache tags used for grouped purge and invalidation.

eviction_policy.description: Eviction policy in effect for this entry or its parent cache instance.

data_type.description: Cache data structure or serialization format for the value.

hit_count.description: Number of cache hits recorded against this entry since creation.
